noNodesDesc: Add a worker node to start deploying projects

editDialog.title: Edit Node
editDialog.urlHint: Worker address, e.g. https://fl.dataforge.me or http://IP:PORT

apiKeyDialog.title: Node API Key
apiKeyDialog.desc: Copy this API key now. You won't be able to see it again. Use it as NODE_API_KEY env var on the worker.
apiKeyDialog.warning: Save this key — it will only be shown once.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Node
deleteConfirm.desc: This will remove the node and stop all Docker containers on the remote machine. Existing projects will need to be migrated. This action cannot be undone.

title: Worker Nodes
emptyDesc: Add a worker node to start deploying projects
setupCommandDesc: Run this command on your server to install the DataForge worker node. The token expires in 1 hour.

updateDialog.title: Update Node
updateDialog.confirmDesc: Watchtower will pull the new image and restart the container. This takes 1-2 minutes.
updateDialog.wait: Don't close this window. The page will update automatically.
updateDialog.failedDesc: Failed to update node. Check logs.
